text:
- [escalation] Andy: Andrew Lang sent a personal newsletter-style message about changing people.
- [escalation] Mrs. Lang: Empty email from Sarah Moyer with no subject or content in snippet.
- [escalation] Zamzar: Zamzar billing notification that recent payment failed and payment details need updating.
- [escalation] Mrs. Lang: Sarah Moyer (Mrs. Lang) updates that they missed the 10:30 ferry and will arrive around 12:30, declining food offer.
- [escalation] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that the Loop Monitor workflow in jeeves-unchained repository has failed.
- [reply needed] Zamzar Limited: Zamzar billing is requesting updated payment details due to a failed payment.
- [reply needed] Barry: Barry shared a NYTimes article about AI in university curriculum.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch asks Michael and David about finding and reclaiming missing sections of a website from WayBack Machine copies.
- [decision required] Google Play: Google One subscription suspended due to declined payment; requires payment method update to reactivate.
- [scheduling] Peter Nordlund: Peter Nordlund invites Matt and Michael to June 19 Scriptural Reasoning and asks if they can bring fruit.
